actions.action: Create and update the latest news briefing.
actions.fallback_action: If the news briefing fails in the future, regenerate the briefing by fetching the most recent news stories from reliable sources and check for any technical issues affecting the process.

recipe.steps: Fetch the most recent news updates from reliable sources such as CNN and Fox News.
Compile the fetched news stories into a structured news briefing.
Save the news briefing to memory for future use.
Verify if the action has been completed successfully.

actions.action: Plays the pre-synthesized news video (updated every 5 hours).
actions.fallback_action: If this action fails in the future, verify that the video is correctly fetched and that there are no technical issues preventing it from playing.

recipe.steps: If the latest pre-synthesized news video is not available, fetch it using a key identifier.
If you have the latest video, proceed to play it.
Create a scheduled job to update and play the pre-synthesized news video (updated every 5 hours).

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Description: Update and play the pre-synthesized news video every 5 hours.

actions.action: Invites the user to ask questions after the briefing

recipe.steps: Generate a comprehensive daily news briefing covering major topics (Middle East Conflict, International Affairs, Science and Space, Climate and Environment, Global Business, Health and Entertainment, Sports).
Invite the user to ask questions or request more detailed information on specific topics.
Verify completion of the action by StatusVerifier agent.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Plays the pre-synthesized news video which is updated every 5 hours.
